name: Blintzas
recipeInstructions:
- Mix flour and salt in a bowl.
- In a separate bowl, beat eggs well, then add water.
- Gradually stir the flour mixture into the egg-water mixture until you have a smooth, thin batter. Heat a small non-stick frying pan (Teflon works well) over medium heat and brush with a thin layer of butter.
- Pour about 1/4 cup batter into the center of the hot pan, tilting to spread it evenly.
- Cook until bubbles form and the edges begin to set, then flip and cook until golden brown on the other side. Transfer to a plate or tablecloth.
- Repeat with remaining batter, using all of it to make about 10-12 blintzas.
- Mix 1 lb Cottage cheese, 1 Egg yolk, and 1 tsp Sugar in a bowl until well combined.
- Spread some filling onto each blintza, off-center.
- Fold the bottom up and top down, then fold in the sides before closing.
- Store in the fridge or freeze. They freeze well.
- To serve, fry the blintzas in a small amount of butter until golden brown. Serve with sour cream.
This recipe makes 24 blintzas. Adjust quantities as needed.
